title: Connext Bug Bounty

audit.reason: The submission provides a detailed analysis of the Connext protocol, including a comprehensive documentation review and codebase analysis. The identified vulnerability, a reentrancy attack in the `Connext.sol` contract, is clearly described with a proof of concept (PoC) code and a suggested fix. The submission is thorough and meets the requirements for a bug bounty submission.
audit.improvements: Consider expanding the analysis to include more specific details about the tested codebase version and any additional test cases that were executed. Additionally, providing more context on the potential impact of the identified vulnerability could enhance the submission.
